author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Create the first commercial packaging layer for BDC Designer and Restricted BDC services, covering audit, workshop, pilot, and hybrid architecture design offers.
research_question: Can the validated BDC asset be translated into a clear, credible, and commercially usable offer pack without overstating what the system does?

offer_types.name: Architecture Audit
offer_types.description: Short assessment of a client's current cooperative AI workflow with BDC-based recommendations.

offer_types.name: Workshop
offer_types.description: Architecture design workshop for engineering and product teams.

offer_types.name: Pilot Engagement
offer_types.description: BDC-guided pilot architecture redesign on one selected workflow.

offer_types.name: Hybrid Design Advisory
offer_types.description: Higher-touch service using BDC CLI plus hybrid search guidance.
